calendar.matters: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION (PER EX PARTE ORDER FILED 06/16/2026)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-23-2026 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Hearing Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Anna Goncharova, Esq. 669-225-6424 AVery Legal Advisors for Plaintiff.
Sabina Sadykhova, Esq. 925-732-1131 specially appearing for both Defendants.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Ms. Goncharova contests and present argument; Agrees the rules were properly applied, contests failure to secure OSC and failure to provide timely notice, presents timeline on OSC, had to choose between TRO or Motion for Preliminary Injunction, served by subsitute service.
The Court comments and poses questions; service of notice ineffective, jurisdictional, esoteric technicality.
Ms. Sadykhova agrees with the TR; rules clear to proceed by OSC, Defendant has not appeared. jurisdictional issue.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff On the Roll Catering and Events, LLC's Motion for Preliminary Hearing is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***
